recommendations.title: No Man's Land
recommendations.overview: Two soldiers from opposite sides get stuck between the front lines in the same trench. The UN is asked to free them and both sides agree on a ceasefire, but will they stick to it?

recommendations.title: The Postcard Killings
recommendations.overview: After suffering a personal tragedy, and desperate for justice, Jacob Kanon, a veteran New York City police detective, embarks on the search for a twisted killer who is leaving a bloody trail of elaborate murders across Europe.

recommendations.title: September 11
recommendations.overview: An anthology of short films inspired by the events of the September 11 World Trade Center attacks.
recommendations.director: Ken Loach, Shōhei Imamura, Samira Makhmalbaf, Idrissa Ouedraogo, Alejandro González Iñárritu, Claude Lelouch, Amos Gitai, Sean Penn, Danis Tanović, Youssef Chahine, Mira Nair

recommendations.title: Oldboy
recommendations.overview: With no clue how he came to be imprisoned, drugged and tortured for 15 years, a desperate man seeks revenge on his captors.

recommendations.title: The Secret in Their Eyes
recommendations.overview: Hoping to put to rest years of unease concerning a past case, retired criminal investigator Benjamín begins writing a novel based on the unsolved mystery of a newlywed’s rape and murder. With the help of a former colleague, judge Irene, he attempts t

recommendations.title: Body Cam
recommendations.overview: As a police officer investigates the gruesome murder of her colleague, she discovers that a mysterious supernatural force is behind it.

recommendations.title: The House That Dripped Blood
recommendations.overview: A Scotland Yard investigator looks into four mysterious cases involving an unoccupied house.

recommendations.title: Intrusion
recommendations.overview: When a husband and wife move to a small town, a home invasion leaves the wife traumatized and suspicious that those around her might not be who they seem.

recommendations.title: Elephant Song
recommendations.overview: A psychiatrist is drawn into a complex mind game when he questions a disturbed patient about the disappearance of a colleague.

recommendations.title: The Final Cut
recommendations.overview: Set in a world with memory implants, Alan Hakman is a 'cutter'—someone with the power of final edit over people's recorded histories—but his latest assignment puts him in great danger.
